span.p: Component View: Archkit Monolith Application - NestJS Application

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Klien eksternal (Postman,
frontend app, Artillery load
tester) yang berinteraksi via
REST API.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Menangani HTTP request untuk
operasi CRUD produk.
Endpoints: POST /products,
GET /products, GET
/products/:id, PATCH
/products/:id, DELETE
/products/:id

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Memvalidasi body request
menggunakan Zod Schema
sebelum mencapai handler.
Digunakan pada POST dan
PATCH.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Mendefinisikan aturan
validasi: CreateProductSchema
dan UpdateProductSchema
(partial).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Mengandung business logic
untuk manajemen produk.
Methods: create, findAll,
findOne, update, remove.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Representasi ORM dari tabel
products. Fields: id (UUID
PK), name, price (decimal),
description, category,
createdAt, updatedAt,
version.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Repository TypeORM
diinjeksikan melalui
@InjectRepository(Product).
Menyediakan operasi database
(find, save, update, delete).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Database tunggal bersama yang
menyimpan semua data:
products, inventory,
sales_transactions, dan
sales_items.
